race.description: Ladbrokes Racing Extras In Multi Mdn Plate (C1)
race.comment: KNIGHTS REIGN (2) continues to race well, the latest strong on pace when placed here over 1350m. Aided by the claim and will go close again. LAST TREMBLE (5) was a close-up fourth in a similar race two back then safely held over further last time. Well worth another chance. RESPITE (6) continued the good recent form when she finished just a neck away in second last time out over 1350m at this track. Should be poised just off the lead. Close to a win and is among the chances again. REGAL HUNTER (3) hasn't shown much this time in, last start finishing 2.25 lengths away in fifth over 1390m at Hobart. Can give a sight off the low draw.
